## Walkthrough

This PR completes Phase 2 of the Quality Batch Release cockpit integration by adding comprehensive documentation, source tracking across adapters and panels, UI enhancements with disclaimers and error states, new test coverage, and workspace-level integration with a verification status banner.

## Changes

**Quality Batch Release Phase 2 Completion**

| Layer / File(s) | Summary |
|---|---|
| **Integration documentation and UAT scope** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/README.md`, `domain-integrations/quality/docs/golden-quality-batches.md`, `domain-integrations/quality/docs/quality-known-limitations.md`, `domain-integrations/quality/docs/quality-readiness-checklist.md`, `domain-integrations/quality/docs/quality-uat-acceptance-script.md` | README, known limitations, readiness checklist, and UAT acceptance script document the Quality Batch Release cockpit operational stance (mock-mode release decisions, legacy-API lab board, simulation-only right-rail actions), scope boundaries (no SAP QM writes, no audit trail compliance, Databricks not implemented), readiness gates (development/mock-mode ready, live backend blocked), and three detailed UAT scenarios with pass/fail criteria and expected UI signals. |
| **Adapter source field instrumentation** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/src/adapters/connected-quality-lab-adapter.ts`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/adapters/quality-blockers-adapter.ts`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/adapters/quality-release-adapter.ts`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/adapters/connected-quality-lab-legacy-api-adapter.test.ts` | Mock adapters now include `source: 'mock'` and legacy-API adapter returns `source: 'legacy-api'` in all AdapterResult objects (success and error cases), enabling downstream components to track and display data provenance. Tests verify error handling and payload edge cases. |
| **Panel source propagation to EvidencePanel** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/coa-readiness-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/decision-history-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/deviations-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/quality-blockers-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/quality-results-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/release-hold-impact-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/release-queue-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/release-summary-panel.tsx` | All quality panels now forward `source` field from adapter results into EvidencePanel, enabling source badges and mock-vs-live labeling throughout the cockpit. |
| **Panel UI enhancements - disclaimers, error states, and styling** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/coa-readiness-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/deviations-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/quality-results-panel.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/release-summary-panel.tsx` | CoA panel renders "document unavailable" fallback and disclaimer; quality-results panel shows "inspection lot not found" and MIC failure detail warnings; all panels add italic disclaimers clarifying simulated data; status style mappings extended with `unknown` entry for consistent greyed handling. |
| **Panel test coverage for CoAReadinessPanel and QualityResultsPanel** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/coa-readiness-panel.test.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/quality-results-panel.test.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/panels/release-summary-panel.test.tsx` | New Vitest suites verify CoAReadinessPanel and QualityResultsPanel render correctly for missing data, error conditions, and successful states; ReleaseSummaryPanel tests verify advisory/note footnotes and absence of live source badges in mock mode. |
| **Workspace integration and configuration updates** <br> `domain-integrations/quality/src/batch-release-workspace.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/views/operations-evidence-view.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/views/quality-evidence-view.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/src/views/warehouse-trace-evidence-view.tsx`, `domain-integrations/quality/tsconfig.json` | BatchReleaseWorkspace renders VerificationStatusBanner showing integration verification status (`partial-native`) and limitations; ESLint directives added to evidence views to permit cross-module boundaries; tsconfig updated to include Vitest config in TypeScript compilation. |

🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes

## Code Review

This pull request establishes the Quality and Batch Release domain integration, implementing a hybrid architecture that utilizes both mock data and legacy APIs. Key additions include comprehensive documentation for UAT and readiness, adapter updates to track data provenance, and UI enhancements for status visibility. Feedback focuses on architectural concerns regarding cross-domain dependency management and the need for consistent styling through shared color constants instead of hardcoded hex values.
--
